GGCon Talents VA Panels VTuber Panels Tournaments Schedule About
Talents
Come meet the voices behind your favorite characters from video games! Hear what goes on behind the mic and more!
Bill Millsap
Meet Bill Millsap at GGCon. They will be participating in... "Into the Cinematic Universe: Marvel Rivals Voice Actor Panel," for his role as Punisher!
View Talent
Caleb Yen
Meet Caleb Yen at GGCon. They will be participating in... "Voice Your Fears: A Talk with Nick Apostolides and Caleb Yen," for his role as Fox Mask (Silent Hill f)!
View Talent
Cory Yee
Meet Cory Yee at GGCon. They will be participating in... "From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel", for his role as Gorou!
View Talent
James Mathis III
Meet James Mathis III at GGCon. They will be participating in... "Into the Cinematic Universe: Marvel Rivals Voice Actor Panel," for their role as Black Panther!
View Talent

Meet Jon Bailey at GGCon. They will be participating in... "Into the Cinematic Universe: Marvel Rivals Voice Actor Panel," for his role as Jeff the Land Shark!

Kieran Regan
Meet Kieran Regan at GGCon. They will be participating in... "From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel," for their role as Heizou Shikanoin!
View Talent
Nick Apostolides
Meet Nick Apostolides at GGCon. They will be participating in... "Voice Your Fears: A Talk with Nick Apostolides and Caleb Yen," for his role as Leon Kennedy (Resident Evil)!

Meet Patrick Pedraza at GGCon. They will be participating in... "From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel," for his role as Wanderer!

Meet Sean Chiplock at GGCon. They will be participating in... "From Mondstadt to Inazuma: Genshin Impact Voice Actor Panel," for his role as Diluc!
